title: trigger RowHeader_LClicked
text: trigger RowHeader_LClicked Interactive trigger that is handles processing when the user clicks a row header of the Grid widget. Explain this code trigger RowHeader_LClicked params numeric rowNumber : in numeric shiftKey : in endparams ; <Your code here> end ; trigger RowHeader_LClicked Copy Applies to: Form widgets: egrid (Grid) Activation: Activated when the user clicks the row header of the Grid widget, with or without any combination of the Shift , Alt , and Control keys. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Parameters rowNumber returns the occurrence number of which the row header is clicked. shiftKey returns whether the Shift, Alt, Control, or a combination of these keys, is pressed, when the row header is clicked, as shown in the table. Table 1. Values returned in shiftKey shiftKey Shift Control Alt 0 Not pressed Not pressed Not pressed 1 Pressed Not pressed Not pressed 2 Not pressed Pressed Not pressed 3 Pressed Pressed Not pressed 4 Not pressed Not pressed Pressed 5 Pressed Not pressed Pressed 6 Not pressed Pressed Pressed 7 Pressed Pressed Pressed Was this topic helpful?
